---
title: "Series Overview"
---

<img src="content/images/logo_lwg-long.png" alt="Logo for LegacyWorks Group" width="30%" align="right"/>

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under construction; check back later

<br>


:::{.callout-tip icon="false" collapse="false"}
## {{< fa brain >}} Learning Objectives

After completing this series, participants will be able to:
:::

### Citing These Materials

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under construction; check back later

## Course Structure

:::{.panel-tabset}
### 2026-27 Structure

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under construction; check back later

:::

## Course Scheduling

:::{.panel-tabset}
### 2026-27 Schedule

| **Date** | **Series** | **Primary Instructor** |
|:-----:|:-----------------|:---------|
| May 6, 2027 | 1. Communications Strategy and Best Practices, Tips, and Tools | <span style="color:#4AB2CB">{{< fa people-group >}} TBA </span> |
| June 3, 2027 | 2. Storytelling Basics | <span style="color:#4AB2CB">{{< fa people-group >}} TBA </span> |
| July 1, 2027 | 3.  Storytelling as a Lever for Change and Impact | <span style="color:#4AB2CB">{{< fa people-group >}} TBA </span> |

:::

## Course Policies

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under construction; check back later
